common.name: Name
common.onlyOwnersManagers: Only owners and managers can change these settings.
common.onlyOwnersManagersDefaults: Only owners and managers can change these defaults.

landing.headlineMak: Smarter point of sale for your business - in PKR, for Pakistan
landing.subMak: Accurate sales, live stock, and clear reports in one screen. Web on the desk, Android in the hand. اردو and English, together.
landing.heroAppPlatforms: Full back office in your browser - the Android app for the counter, tables, and floor. Same business, one account.
landing.heroMobileMockAria: Stylized preview of the Taplite Android app with sample sales and items
landing.topStrip: Same numbers from counter to back office - built for dukaan, dhaba, café & thok in Pakistan
landing.kicker: Dukaan · dhaba · thok & more - yahan ke liye
landing.headline: Bills in PKR, staff in اردو, one app that matches your rooj-marrah
landing.sub: Stop juggling WhatsApp, registers, and sheets. Stock, customers, and invoices in rupees, web on the computer, Android on the floor. Full اردو in the app, English jab chahiye.
landing.hookLine: Aik paisa, aik sach. Teen alag alag systems ki jagah: sirf Taplite.
landing.marqueeCities: Lahore · Sialkot · Faisalabad · Gujranwala · Multan · Hyderabad · Karachi · Quetta · Peshawar · Islamabad–Rawalpindi
landing.scrollHint: Scroll for photos, same-day flow, and web + Android - detail neeche hai
landing.imageTagline: Counter & floor - wohi stock, wohi rupee count
landing.trustLine: Fast checkout and real stock - for retail, dining, and wholesale from Karachi to Islamabad to Lahore and beyond
landing.heroStatsLine: PKR · Bilingual: English and اردو in the app · Web + Android
landing.forPakistanTitle: Built for how teams work on the counter and the floor
landing.forPakistanSub: Whether you run a corner shop, a busy dhaba, or a wholesale counter, Taplite keeps the numbers straight - in rupees, with the languages your people actually use every day.
landing.forPakistanPoint1: Sums and invoices in PKR, ready for the way you quote prices locally
landing.forPakistanPoint2: Full اردو interface, with English where your workflow needs it
landing.forPakistanPoint3: One Android app and one web app - the same data at the register and on the go
landing.imageRetailAlt: Retail store counter and shelves, representative of a local shop
landing.imageCafeAlt: Café or restaurant dining and service, representative of hospitality in Pakistan
landing.photoAttribution: Illustrative images bundled in the app (not live links to external sites).
landing.bentoSub: One spine for the register, the service floor, and the books - so your PKR and your stock always match.
landing.bentoCardLine: One ledger on every screen. No copy-paste, no reconciling at close.
landing.flow1Body: Check out on the web counter or take table orders on Android. Shortcuts, barcodes, and quick items when seconds count.
landing.flow2Body: Every sale and order updates on-hand counts so you know what is low before you are empty.
landing.flow3Body: Invoices, customers, and roles in one place - owners get the view, staff get the tools they need.
landing.quoteText: We were juggling three different tools. Now the counter, the kitchen, and the back office all trust the same numbers.
landing.quoteName: Shop and restaurant teams across Pakistan
landing.ctaBandTitle: Get your business on one system
landing.ctaBandSub: No card needed to get started. Train staff in اردو or English - run the back office in the browser and the floor on Android, anywhere in Pakistan.
landing.footerBlurb: Point of sale and back office for businesses in Pakistan. taplite.store.
landing.platformsSub: Run the full flow in the browser or take orders on the floor with the Android app. Same business, your choice of device.
landing.webBody: Sign in on any computer to manage the menu, stock, invoices, and staff. Fast keyboard-first checkout at the register.
landing.androidBody: Table service, quick cart, and kitchen handoff in your pocket. Install on phones or tablets you already use.
landing.androidNoUrl: Android app available - store link coming soon. Ask your admin for the install package if you need it today.

one.title: Instant checkout
one.body: Barcodes, quick items, and printed or shared receipts without leaving the flow.

two.title: Live stock
two.body: Every sale and PO updates inventory so you see low stock before it hurts.

three.title: Your data, your store
three.body: Role-aware access, Supabase-grade security, and a dashboard that matches how you work.

analytics.title: Business insights
analytics.description: Sales trends and product performance for the selected period. Same period options as dashboard stats.
analytics.excludingDrafts: Counts paid, unpaid, and partial invoices only (excludes drafts and cancelled).
analytics.dailySalesHint: Sum of invoice totals posted on each day.
analytics.topProductsHint: Each slice is a share of all line-item revenue in this period. Up to 8 top products are shown; the rest are combined as one slice so the chart always reflects the full product mix.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Sales, stock, and purchasing in one place - built for shops and retail counters.
dashboard.invoiceSectionDesc: Cash or credit from the counter. Stock updates when you complete a sale (not while a draft is open).

lowStockPanel.title: Reorder soon
lowStockPanel.subtitle: Stock at or below your reorder level - restock before you run out.
lowStockPanel.empty: Nothing low right now. Set a reorder level on each product to get alerts here.

openPosPanel.title: Purchase orders in progress
openPosPanel.subtitle: Drafts, sent to suppliers, or partially received - know what is still open.
openPosPanel.empty: No open purchase orders. Create one when you place stock with a supplier.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Invoice defaults and owner WhatsApp alerts.
settings.profileSectionDesc: Update your business display name and logo.
settings.invoiceSectionDesc: New invoices start with these values. Staff can still adjust tax and discounts on each sale.
settings.whatsappSectionDesc: Configure the server env: {phoneId}, {token}, and a UTILITY template named {template} using named placeholders only (lowercase snake_case). Either two body variables {varTitle} and {varBody}, or set {singleBody} and use a single {varBodyOnly} (title and body are combined). If Meta says the template has too many variables for its length, add more fixed text in the template body or use the single-variable option. Override names with {paramTitle} / {paramBody}. Daily digests run via {cronPath} + {cronSecret} and {serviceKey}.
settings.adminConsoleDesc: Open the superadmin dashboard to set subscription status for each business.

businessProfile.logoHint: JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP. Max 2MB.

expenses.title: Business expenses
expenses.subtitle: Track non-inventory business spending across your shop.

admin.title: Platform admin
admin.overviewIntro: Counts are from Supabase Auth (all accounts) and public businesses. Open Users to see everyone who signed up (including trial signups before they create a shop).
admin.overviewHint: Ensure SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is set on the server. Auth admin API is required for user lists.
admin.usersIntro: Every email/password or OAuth signup appears here (newest first). “No shop yet” means they have not finished onboarding. Business subscription reflects the linked shop when they have one.
admin.usersHint: If this fails, confirm the service role key and that your Supabase project allows Auth admin API.
admin.businessesHint: If the list is empty but you expect shops, check the businesses table in Supabase. This uses the service role to bypass RLS.

invoiceDefaults.defaultTaxRateHint: Pre-filled on new invoices (you can still change per invoice).
invoiceDefaults.defaultDiscountHint: Fixed amount off the subtotal on new invoices (same as invoice discount field).
invoiceDefaults.defaultLineDiscHint: Applied to each new line you add (e.g. store-wide promo).

whatsappSettings.phoneHint: Same format as Meta “to” field: digits only. Must be allowed in your WhatsApp test/production setup.
whatsappSettings.notifyDaily: Daily report (yesterday UTC: invoices + sales total; include low stock if checked below)
whatsappSettings.notifyLowStock: Include low-stock lines in the daily digest (requires daily report above, or low-stock-only if no daily)
whatsappSettings.notifyPo: When a purchase order is confirmed (ordered)
whatsappSettings.notifyReceive: When stock is received on a PO

auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.
auth.loginFailedCredentials: We couldn’t sign you in. Check your email and password, or use Forgot password to reset your password.
auth.googleSignInError: Couldn’t start Google sign-in. Try again or use your email and password.
auth.oauthOriginError: App URL isn’t configured. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL to your public site (e.g. https://taplite.store).

loginError.wrongEmailOrPassword: That email or password is incorrect. If you’re sure about the email, try your password again or use Forgot password to set a new one.
loginError.emailNotConfirmed: This account’s email isn’t confirmed yet. Open the link in the email we sent you, then try signing in again.
loginError.rateLimited: Too many sign-in attempts. Wait a minute, then try again.
loginError.network: We couldn’t reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
loginError.userBanned: This account can’t sign in right now. Contact support if you need help.

auth.passwordPolicyHint: At least 8 characters, including a letter, a number, and a special character (e.g. ! @ # *).

passwordError.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
passwordError.letter: Include at least one letter (a–z, A–Z).
passwordError.symbol: Include at least one special character (e.g. !, @, #, *).

auth.disposableEmailBlocked: Temporary or disposable email addresses can’t be used. Please sign up with a real inbox you own (e.g. Gmail, Outlook).
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: We’ll email you a link to choose a new password.
auth.forgotPasswordCheckEmail: If that email is registered, you’ll get a link shortly. Check your inbox and spam folder.
auth.updatePasswordSubtitle: Enter a strong password for your account.
auth.updatePasswordSuccess: Your password was updated. You can sign in now.
auth.updatePasswordNoSession: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from the login page.
auth.loginAfterReset: Your password was reset. Sign in with your new password.
auth.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Sign in below, or use Forgot password on the login page if needed.
auth.authError: Could not complete sign-in. Ask your administrator to add {callback} to the app’s allowed redirect URLs in the hosted auth settings.
auth.pkceError: This confirmation link is invalid or was opened in a different browser than the one that started an older sign-up. Request a new confirmation email from sign-in, or sign up again - then open the new link in any browser.

onboarding.title: Create your business
onboarding.subtitle: You can invite team members later from settings.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Large catalogs search on the server (indexed). Results update as you type-no full page reload. USB scanners type into the search box like a keyboard.
products.searchLabel: Find products by name, SKU, or barcode
products.searchPlaceholder: Scan barcode or search name, SKU…
products.scanModeHelp: Scan mode: the search field is focused. Scan a barcode, press Enter to open that product if it matches exactly, or search by name.
products.lowStockFilterHelp: Showing products where stock is at or below reorder level (up to 100 matches). Refine search if needed.
products.emptyLowSearch: No low-stock items match your search.
products.emptyLowNone: No products are low right now. Set a reorder level on products you want to track.
products.emptyNone: No products yet. Add your first product.
products.browseHint: Browsing first 50 products alphabetically. Type to search across the whole catalog (up to 100 matches per search).
products.migrationHint: If this mentions a missing function, apply the latest Supabase migration for {fn}.

productFields.imageHint: JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP. Max 2MB. New upload replaces the current photo.
productFields.imageTooLarge: Image must be {maxMb} MB or smaller.
productFields.imageBadType: Use JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP.
productFields.name: Name
productFields.barcodeHint: Scanners act as a keyboard-no extra app. On the products list use {scanMode} to search by code.
productFields.taxonomyHint: Start typing to match existing names, or enter a new one.

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Manage buyers and credit limits.
customers.emptyPrompt: No customers yet. Add your first customer.

customerFields.name: Name
customerFields.outstandingHint: Updated automatically from invoices and payments.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Create bills, print PDFs, and track payments.

invoiceFinalize.hintCash: Only the invoice total is recorded as payment; change is for the cashier.
invoiceFinalize.footnote: Finalizing records the sale and reduces stock. Use credit when payment comes later; use cash for immediate payment at the counter.

posSale.helpHint: Cash and Credit complete the sale. Save draft to pause.

invoiceEditor.helpCashCredit: Use {cash} or {credit} to finish in one step. Use {draft} to pause without posting.
invoiceEditor.helpCashCreditLong: Use Cash or Credit to finish in one step. Use Save draft only to pause (e.g. customer stepped away).
invoiceEditor.errorCashAmount: Enter the amount received from the customer.
invoiceEditor.errorCashLow: Amount received is less than the invoice total.
invoiceEditor.cashTenderHint: Enter cash tendered; only the invoice total is recorded as payment.

invoiceDetail.reverseConfirm: Reverse this sale? Recorded payments will be removed, what the customer owes will be corrected, stock will go back up where it was reduced, and the bill will show as cancelled. You cannot undo this.
invoiceDetail.reverseHelp: Use this if the sale was entered by mistake. The bill stays in your history for records; payments and stock are rolled back.

purchaseOrders.title: Purchase orders
purchaseOrders.subtitle: Order from suppliers and receive stock into inventory.
purchaseOrders.newSubtitle: Create a draft, confirm when sent to the supplier, then receive stock when goods arrive.
purchaseOrders.unlinkedTitle: Link every line to the catalog before you can confirm or receive
purchaseOrders.unlinkedBody: Receiving stock only updates inventory when the PO line is tied to a product. Use Quick add below for new SKUs, or edit the PO and pick an existing product from the dropdown (new PO from the list).
purchaseOrders.linkedHint: Linked - stock will update on receive
purchaseOrders.needsSyncTitle: Inventory not updated for at least one line
purchaseOrders.needsSyncBody: Stock only increases when the line is linked to a catalog product. If the line name matches exactly one active product (same spelling), you can apply quantities now. Otherwise, edit the product in Products to match the line name, or use the product dropdown on future POs.

errors.title: We couldn’t load this page
errors.description: Try again, or go back to the dashboard. If this keeps happening, contact support.
errors.notFoundDescription: That link doesn’t exist or was moved. Use the buttons below to continue.
